{"problem_standardized_math":"Show that:\\n(i) \\(\\mathcal{N}_2(\\theta_1) \\subset \\mathcal{N}_2(\\theta_2)\\) whenever \\(0 \\le \\theta_1 < \\theta_2 < 1\\), and \\(\\mathcal{N}_{-\\infty}(\\gamma_1) \\subset \\mathcal{N}_{-\\infty}(\\gamma_2)\\) whenever \\(0 < \\gamma_2 \\le \\gamma_1 \\le 1\\).\\n(ii) \\(\\mathcal{N}_2(\\theta) \\subset \\mathcal{N}_{-\\infty}(\\gamma)\\) if \\(\\gamma \\le 1-\\theta\\)."}
